song.title: Circle of Chairs
song.keywords: 12-step, sex addiction anonymous, recovery, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Circle of Chairs' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Circle of Chairs Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Full lyrics to 'Circle of Chairs' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: Circle of Chairs Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Circle of Chairs' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. 12-step meeting.

essay: Circle of Chairs marks the shift from chaos to accountability through recovery community. It reframes shame as something survivable when spoken aloud among people who understand compulsion.
song.lyricsHtml:
They said…
Welcome
Just take a seat I…
I don't know if I can do this

Coffee burns in paper cups
Circles made of metal chairs
Eyes that look but do not judge
They carry the same despair

We've been there we know the fight
We've lost the days we've lost the night
But here we are we're not alone
One day at a time we make it home
One day at a time one day at a time

I'm Mark I can't stop the lies
I'm James I've lost my kids to this fight
I'm Tom I burned through love and trust
We nod because we've done the same

My throat is dry the word won't come
Addict addict addict my heart beats like a drum
But silence never saved me not before
So I stand I speak I open the door

We've been there we know the fight
We've lost the days we've lost the night
But here we are we're not alone
One day at a time we make it home
One day at a time one day at a time

My name is… um… and I'm a sex addict
One day at a time one day at a time
